title: ochrosia thiollierei
intro: Ochrosia thiollierei, also known as the 'Madagascar Alligator Apple', is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which is used to treat various health conditions. The bark of Ochrosia thiollierei contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote overall health and well-being, particularly in traditional medicine.
